notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8. It addresses 26 CVEs: CVE-2019-15505, CVE-2022-4378, CVE-2022-45886, CVE-2022-45919, CVE-2023-0266, and 21 more.
